column1:
- Who told________the news? (SHE/SHE)

- A friend of________ .
Sally's textbook is on the desk. Where is________? (I)
Each galaxy may contain___________of stars. The Milky Way_________contains several_________stars. (TRILLION/IT/BILLION)
She is the___________tennis player in the group. (GOOD)

- Here is the hotel we stayed in.

- That looks_____________ . (WONDERFUL)
Which is__________: Test One or Test Two? (EASY)
This snake is________________harmless, but it protects__________from______________by pretending to be dangerous. (COMPLETE/IT/ENEMY)
Boys, you'll enjoy__________if you travel by train. (YOU)
Come and meet Julia. She's a good friend of__________ . (I)
The ground was covered with yellow and red______________ . (LEAF)
______________of beautiful animals live on coral reefs. (THOUSAND)
Did Jane enjoy__________at the concert last night? (SHE)
Jane, did you enjoy________________at the concert last night? (YOU)
